title: Vežba 7

questions.text: Koja rečenica koristi glagol Future Continuous pravilno?

answers.answer: The team works on the project tomorrow morning.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica koristi glagol Simple Present, a ne glagol Future Continuous.

answers.answer: The team will complete the project tomorrow.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica se nalazi u glagolu Simple Future, a nije glagol Future Continuous.

answers.answer: The team will be working on the project tomorrow morning.
The team was working on the project yesterday.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica se nalazi u glagolu Past Continuous, nije glagol Future Continuous.

instructions: Ovo vežbanje nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje koje se nalazi dole i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation: Glagol sa Future Continuous koji ima strukturu will be + glagol koji se završava na -ing opisuje radnje koje će biti u toku u nekom budućem trenutku.
